title: Potion Enchants
description: Adds enchantments that give potion effects as buffs to a player wearing armor enchanted with them.
body:
!! Requires Experimental Settings to be enabled !!

This datapack adds the following potion buffs as enchantments:
- Speed 1&2
- Haste 1&2
- Strength 1&2
- Jump Boost 1&2
- Water Breathing
- Slow Falling
- Fire Resistance

These can be very strong to have up all the time, keep that in mind. You can get them as enchanted books from treasure chests or by trading with a librarian villager. They can be great to use in your endgame world, server minigame or adventure map. Make sure to give me a shoutout/link to this page if you publish your map!
